flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Juan College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.6k → $1.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Juan College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Juan College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at San Juan College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9k → 4.3k).
